reasoning:
component_architecture_and_react_patterns: The file/folder decomposition is broadly aligned with the prompt (context, hooks, components, utils) and uses Context + useReducer with functional components. However, concerns leak across boundaries and key integrations are incomplete: undo is not wired into board actions, SearchBar undo props are hardcoded, filteredCards is computed but unused, and some hooks are effectively placeholders. There are also several unused imports/variables and partial logic comments in production code.
typescript_strictness: tsconfig strict mode is enabled and core domain types/actions are defined with a discriminated union. But typing quality is inconsistent: some helper functions use broad string types instead of Priority, prop signatures are mismatched (e.g., card drag payload typing), and with noUnusedLocals/noUnusedParameters enabled there are many likely compile-breaking unused symbols. Non-null assertion in main is present and not documented.
drag_and_drop_implementation: Uses native HTML5 DnD APIs (dragstart/dragover/drop/dragend) without external DnD libraries, and provides some visual feedback (drag styles, bottom placeholder). It supports intended column/card drag paths conceptually. But implementation is incomplete/fragile: limited event coverage (no dragenter/dragleave handling), questionable reorder logic, weak placeholder behavior for precise insertion, and likely type/runtime issues in wiring handlers.
accessibility_and_keyboard_support: Basic focusability and some ARIA labels/roles exist, and dark mode toggle persists and respects system preference on load. But major required accessibility features are missing: no live region announcements, no implemented keyboard card movement (Alt+Arrow is explicitly left as a comment), incomplete keyboard support for all CRUD actions, and no focus management after create/delete/move.
search_filter_and_undo: Search/priority/tag state UI exists, but filtering behavior is not correctly applied to rendered cards; cards are neither properly filtered nor dimmed per requirement (filteredCards result is unused). Undo is largely non-functional: history is not recorded from board actions, keyboard hook creates separate undo state, and Undo button is wired as a noop in Board.
code_quality_and_project_setup: Structure mostly matches requested paths, but critical setup issues remain: vite.config imports @vitejs/plugin-react but package.json does not include it, tailwind.config.ts is missing despite being requested, and strict compiler flags likely fail due to many unused imports/vars and mismatched typings. There are also dead-code comments and unfinished logic, so this is not reliably runnable as delivered.
